videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: When All Your Creatures are a Planeswalker, Actually | Much Abrew
videos.description:
What if you could turn all of your creatures into Grist, the Hunger Tide and then use them to make infinite Insects? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-grist-s-first-day-of-class-historic
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7339383#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/xXVAy
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/Zlnpd
